summary: The stock has both bullish and bearish factors, with a slight edge towards bearish conditions due to overbought risk and negative return momentum.
bullish_factors: Price is above the 20-day moving average.
The 12-day EMA is above the 26-day EMA, supporting positive momentum.
MACD is above its signal line, indicating positive momentum.
bearish_factors: The stock has negative 5-day return momentum.
The stock has negative 20-day return momentum.
RSI is above 70, suggesting overbought conditions.
